inputs.label: Last Menstrual Period Day of Year
inputs.businessContext: The day of the year (1-365) when the last menstrual period started.

inputs.label: Current Day of Year
inputs.businessContext: The current day of the year (1-365) for calculating pregnancy week.

inputs.label: Average Cycle Length
inputs.businessContext: The average length of the menstrual cycle in days, used to adjust due date.

inputs.label: Gestation Length Override
inputs.businessContext: Override for the standard 280-day gestation period, if your healthcare provider advises a different duration.
